name: Blackberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine blackberries, sugar, and lemon juice in a pot.
2. Cover and cook until bubbling, about 10 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and place mixture in a food processor to blend.
4. Pass through a strainer to remove seeds.
5. Chill before serving.
6. Can be frozen for up to 1 year.
Makes 1 Cup
